methodsAttempted.query: site:tohoku.ac.jp 東北大学 生成AI ChatGPT ガイドライン 学生 教員
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced official Tohoku University Online Class Guide pages for students and staff about ChatGPT and generative AI, plus lower-specificity official pages and reports.

methodsAttempted.query: site:tohoku.ac.jp "生成AI" "東北大学" "利用" "学生" "教職員"
methodsAttempted.notes: A second Firecrawl search confirmed the same student and staff AI-use pages and found DX Navigation pages that link to a login-gated internal generative AI service guide.
Links from the Online Class Guide homepage and past-info pages were checked to distinguish direct AI-use guidance from generic announcements and training/event pages.
Public DX Navigation pages were followed to identify the internal generative AI service guide; the destination redirected to Google Accounts sign-in and was not bypassed.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found two direct Japanese Tohoku University Online Class Guide pages on ChatGPT and generative AI use, one for students and one for staff. A public Tohoku DX Navigation page was also used only for the narrow source-status claim that a generative AI service guide exists but is behind Tohoku-account Google sign-in. Generic guide, past-info, workshop, duplicate DX, and login-gated internal pages were recorded as rejected or blocked and were not used as policy evidence.

artifacts.claimText: Tohoku University's student-facing Online Class Guide says students need to confirm generative AI use, including whether it is allowed, with the instructor for each class.

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）

artifacts.claimText: The same student guidance says some classes may prohibit or limit generative AI use and that students should follow the instructor's instructions.

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）

artifacts.claimText: The student guidance warns that generative AI output can contain errors and says students need to check for themselves whether AI output is correct.

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）

artifacts.claimText: Tohoku University's staff-facing guidance suggests instructors consider, according to each class, whether to partially prohibit, warn about, or use generative AI; it presents these as examples rather than a single mandatory rule.

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（教員向け）

artifacts.claimText: Tohoku University's generative AI guidance cautions that unpublished research results, confidential information, entrance-exam information, and student or staff personal information can be exposed to service providers or other users through generative AI and translation services.

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（教員向け）

artifacts.claimText: Tohoku University's public DX Navigation page lists a generative AI service guide for staff, but the linked guide is a Google Site that requires Tohoku email Google-account sign-in; this staged crawl did not access the restricted content.

citation.citationTitle: 事務（技術）職員の方向け | 東北大学 DXナビゲーション

artifacts.sourceTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: ChatGPTをはじめとする生成系AIの利用については、授業ごとに、使用の可否も含めて担当教員に確認の上で行う必要がありますが、このページでは、学生が生成系AIを利用する際の注意点について説明します。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Students need to check with the instructor for each class, including whether generative AI use is allowed.

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）

artifacts.sourceTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 授業によっては、生成系AIの使用を禁止したり限定したりする場合があります。生成系AIの使用については、担当教員の指示に従ってください。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Some classes may prohibit or limit generative AI use; students should follow the instructor's instructions.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: 教育・学習における生成系AIに関する留意事項

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）

artifacts.sourceTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 調べ学習等で使用する場合も、AIの出力には誤りが混ざっていることも少なくなく、AIの出力が正しい内容か、誤った内容なのか、自身でしっかり確認する必要がある
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: When using AI for research-style learning, students need to check whether the AI output is correct because errors are often mixed in.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: 教育・学習における生成系AIに関する留意事項

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（学生向け）

artifacts.sourceTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（教員向け）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 教員自らが、生成系AIに何ができて何ができないのかを知った上で、生成系AIとどう向き合うべきかを考え、部分的に禁止するなり注意喚起するなり活用していくなりするのがよいのではないかと思われます。例えば、多くの学生が使用することも想定した上で、必要に応じて以下のような対策を講じることが考えられます。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The page suggests instructors understand AI capabilities and limits and consider partial prohibition, warnings, or use as appropriate.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: 生成系AIへの対応方法案

citation.citationTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（教員向け）

artifacts.sourceTitle: ChatGPT等の生成系AI利用に関する留意事項（教員向け）
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 機密情報についても同じことが言えます。入試に関する情報や学生・教職員の個人情報など、外部に漏らしてはならない情報が、生成系AIなどを通じてサービス提供事業者に伝わってしまうリスクや、他の利用者への回答として提示されてしまうリスクがあることを知っておく必要があります。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidance warns that confidential information, entrance-exam information, and student or staff personal information may be transmitted to service providers or shown to other users through generative AI.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: その他の注意点（研究インテグリティ、サイバーセキュリティ等）

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow student-facing course-by-course confirmation claim directly supported by original Japanese evidence.
Approved because the source says some classes may prohibit or limit AI use and students should follow instructor instructions.
Approved as a source-bounded caution about checking AI output accuracy, not a broader assessment rule.
Approved with wording that preserves the source's suggested/example framing and avoids converting suggestions into mandatory rules.
Approved as a privacy/confidentiality caution grounded in the staff-facing official guidance.
Approved only as a source-status claim. The restricted internal guide content was not accessed or used.

artifacts.title: Tohoku University staged AI policy crawl
artifacts.summary: Staged crawl for Tohoku University found direct Japanese official guidance for students and staff on ChatGPT/generative AI use. Claims are limited to course-by-course student confirmation, instructor-specific limits, AI-output accuracy checking, instructor response options, confidentiality/privacy cautions, and the public status of a login-gated internal generative AI services guide.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The student and staff AI-use pages are Japanese official Online Class Guide pages; English display snippets are helper translations only.
The internal DX generative AI service guide redirected to Google Accounts sign-in and was not accessed, so no claim describes its contents.
Workshop pages, past notices, and generic guide/index pages were not treated as binding policy evidence.
No claim is marked human_reviewed, publishAsCanonical, or isCanonical.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
